title: Bot messages registry
description: Shared registry of bot messages. The source of truth for codes, labels, descriptions and default values; read by both Laravel (App\Support\BotMessageCatalog) and Python (repositories/messages.py). Admin overrides are stored separately — in the bot_messages table.

code.description: The machine code of the message (matches the bot_messages.code column and the constants in repositories/messages.py).

label.description: Human-readable label for the admin UI.

description.description: When this message is sent (a hint in the admin UI).

default.description: Default text (inline HTML) when there is no active override in bot_messages.
